title: ferulago scabra
intro: Ferulago scabra, also known as rough ferulago, is a perennial plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ferulago scabra include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and it is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
